message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant FireDepartment as "FireDepartment"
participant FireBrigadeUnit as "FireBrigadeUnit"

FireDepartment ->> FireBrigadeUnit: 1 ustal typ zdarzenia(strategia, ustal losowy czas)
FireBrigadeUnit ->> FireDepartment: 2 wybierz jednostke
FireDepartment ->> FireBrigadeUnit: 3 wyslij x wozow
FireBrigadeUnit ->> FireDepartment: 4 wyslalem y wozow

alt [x==y]
FireDepartment -> FireBrigadeUnit: 5 koniec zgloszenia
FireBrigadeUnit -> FireDepartment: 6 wybierz jednostke
FireDepartment -> FireBrigadeUnit: 7 wyslij x-y wozow
FireBrigadeUnit -> FireDepartment: 8 wyslalem z wozow
FireDepartment -> FireBrigadeUnit: 9 wyslij -x wozow (oddaje ci x aut)
end alt

@enduml
